Its rows are explicitly synthetic, production_wz_rows_written is false, same-source and canonical-Higgs identities are false, g2 and matched covariance are absent, and the strict W/Z row, same-source EW action, matched covariance, W/Z gate, assembly, retained-route, and campaign certificates all deny proposal authority.
